catalog.alerts.title: Stock alerts

catalog.error.priceInvalid: Price must be a positive number.
catalog.error.quantityInvalid: Quantity must be a non-negative integer.
catalog.error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
catalog.csv.instructions: Expected format: nom,description,prix,categorie,quantite,seuil_alerte. Required columns: nom and prix.
orders.list.title: My orders
orders.error.notAuthenticated: You must be logged in to access this page.
orders.detail.title: Order {{number}}
orders.wire.title: Wire transfer confirmation
orders.wire.description: This order is awaiting wire transfer confirmation. After verifying receipt of the wire transfer, confirm or reject the payment.
orders.wire.confirmPrompt: Confirm receipt of wire transfer? The order will move to awaiting processing.
orders.wire.rejectPrompt: Reject the wire transfer? The order will be cancelled and the buyer notified.
orders.ship.title: Declare shipment
orders.ship.description: Enter the tracking number from the carrier drop-off receipt.
orders.ship.confirmPrompt: Confirm shipment with this tracking number? The buyer will be notified.
orders.postShipCancel.title: Post-shipment cancellation
orders.postShipCancel.description: You may accept cancellation of this shipped order, with or without requiring a parcel return.
orders.postShipCancel.acceptReturnPrompt: Require parcel return before refund? The buyer will be notified.
orders.postShipCancel.waiveReturnPrompt: Accept cancellation without return? Refund will be triggered immediately.
orders.confirmReturn.title: Confirm return received
orders.confirmReturn.description: Confirm that you have received the parcel returned by the buyer.
orders.confirmReturn.prompt: Confirm receipt of returned parcel? The refund will be triggered.
orders.wireRefund.title: Confirm wire refund
orders.wireRefund.description: Send the wire transfer refund to the IBAN below, then confirm.
orders.wireRefund.prompt: Confirm that the wire refund has been sent?
orders.buyerCancelRequest.title: Buyer cancellation request
orders.buyerCancelRequest.description: The buyer has requested cancellation of this shipped order. You may accept (with or without return) or refuse.
orders.buyerCancelRequest.acceptReturnPr: Require parcel return before refund? The buyer will be notified.
orders.buyerCancelRequest.waiveReturnPro: Accept cancellation without return? Refund will be triggered immediately.
orders.buyerCancelRequest.refusePrompt: Refuse the cancellation request? The buyer will be notified and the order reverts to Shipped.
maintenance.title: Platform under maintenance
maintenance.message: Our platform is temporarily unavailable for maintenance. Please try again in a few moments.
